responseTime.title: Quick Response Time
responseTime.description: We typically respond to all inquiries within 24 hours. For urgent bookings, call or WhatsApp us directly.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Quick answers to common questions about our services
faq.question1: How far in advance should I book?
faq.answer1: For weddings, we recommend booking at least 6-12 months in advance, especially for peak season (May-October). For other services like portraits or events, 2-4 weeks notice is typically sufficient, though last-minute bookings may be available.
faq.question2: What is included in your packages?
faq.answer2: All our packages include professional photography, post-processing, high-resolution digital images, and online gallery. Specific inclusions vary by package - from number of hours, locations, outfit changes, and additional photographers. We'll discuss all details during your consultation.
faq.question3: Do you travel for destination photography?
faq.answer3: Absolutely! We love traveling for destination weddings and events. Travel fees vary by location and are quoted separately. We've photographed events across the country and internationally.
faq.question4: How long until I receive my photos?
faq.answer4: Turnaround times vary by service type. Weddings typically take 4-6 weeks for the full gallery. Portrait sessions are delivered within 2-3 weeks. We provide sneak peeks within 48 hours for weddings and special events.
